sample_valid_maps.action: Appoint a Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) at senior management level reporting directly to MD & CEO within 30 days
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 1(c) mandates CISO appointment — IT owns security leadership, Critical due to immediate 30-day implementation requirement

sample_valid_maps.action: Implement Board-approved Cybersecurity Policy within 90 days, covering all digital systems, to be reviewed annually
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 3(a) mandates Board-approved Cybersecurity Policy within 90 days — IT drafts the policy, Critical due to mandatory 90-day deadline

sample_valid_maps.action: Implement critical security patch management: apply critical patches within 30 days and high-severity patches within 60 days of vendor release
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 3(c) mandates patch management timelines — IT owns patching operations, Critical due to security risk from unpatched systems

sample_valid_maps.action: Conduct Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing (VAPT) twice annually using CERT-In empanelled auditor; present report to Board IT Strategy Committee within 60 days
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 4(a-c) mandates bi-annual VAPT — IT owns security testing, High priority due to recurring governance obligation

sample_valid_maps.action: Establish 24x7 Security Operations Centre (SOC) by March 31, 2023 for entities with total assets above Rs. 1,000 crore
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 5(a) mandates SOC by March 2023 — IT owns SOC implementation, High priority due to explicit deadline with asset-size threshold

sample_valid_maps.action: Report all significant cyber incidents to RBI within 6 hours of detection using the CSITE reporting portal
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 6(c) mandates 6-hour incident reporting — Compliance owns regulatory reporting, Critical due to short reporting window and regulatory obligation

sample_valid_maps.action: Test Business Continuity Plan and Disaster Recovery Plan at least annually through live drills; ensure RTO of 4 hours and RPO of 2 hours for core banking systems
sample_valid_maps.validation_notes: Section 7(a-c) mandates BCP/DRP testing — IT owns infrastructure resilience, High priority due to ongoing operational risk management obligation
